release_notes: UI/UX theme audit: dark/light contrast tokens (text2/muted/border), QApp PlaceholderText palette, Void Sale solid err_dim, dashboard zebra via ThemeTableDelegate only, POS light QSS uses live tokens (no hardcoded #FFFFFF), formLabel retint, checkout button spacing. Preserves Credit Sales 2.3.59, Dropdowns, Cash Rounding, Payment Variance, Consumption, inventory retint/statusbar. No Setup/GitHub Release publish.
